creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jadawin     2009-01-28 09:20:09 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-WWW-TinySong  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  tinysong.com is a web app that can be queried for a
  song and returns a tiny URL, allowing you to listen
  to the song for free online and share it with friends.
  TinySong is a Perl interface to this service, allowing
  you to programmatically search its underlying database.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/~miorel/WWW-TinySong-0.05/
  
  PR:             ports/131056
  Submitted by:   Dennis Herrmann <adox at mcx2.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2251    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/www/p5-WWW-TinySong/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/p5-WWW-TinySong/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/www/p5-WWW-TinySong/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/p5-WWW-TinySong/pkg-plist (new)
